options.content:
## Two sources, two questions

- **GROUND TRUTH (Steampipe → AWS Cost Explorer):** what AWS actually billed. Grouped by the **per-model service lines** (`Claude Haiku 4.5 (Amazon Bedrock Edition)`, `Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Amazon Bedrock Edition)`, `Amazon Bedrock` = Titan only). **Never filter on `SERVICE = Amazon Bedrock`** — that hides ~99% of spend. Requires `ce:GetCostAndUsage` on the Steampipe IAM identity.
- **ATTRIBUTION (RDS `prompt_invocations`):** which user / pipeline caused the cost — computed from recorded tokens × price map. Only as complete as `recordBedrockCost` coverage. The gap between the two rows below = **unrecorded spend** (apps invoking Bedrock without booking cost).

panels.title: Ground truth — AWS billed (Cost Explorer via Steampipe)
AWS-billed Bedrock spend by service line (30 d)
panels.description: Authoritative — sums Cost Explorer unblended cost per per-model service line. If this panel errors with AccessDenied, the Steampipe IAM identity is missing ce:GetCostAndUsage.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  service,
  round(sum(unblended_cost_amount::numeric), 2) AS usd_30d
FROM aws_cost_by_service_daily
WHERE period_start >= (current_date - interval '30 days')
  AND (service ILIKE '%bedrock%' OR service ILIKE '%claude%' OR service ILIKE '%titan%')
GROUP BY service
ORDER BY usd_30d DESC

panels.title: AWS-billed Bedrock spend — daily by service line

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  period_start AS time,
  service AS metric,
  unblended_cost_amount::float AS value
FROM aws_cost_by_service_daily
WHERE period_start >= (current_date - interval '30 days')
  AND (service ILIKE '%bedrock%' OR service ILIKE '%claude%' OR service ILIKE '%titan%')
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Recorded spend by pipeline + agent (24 h)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT pipeline, agent,
  COUNT(*) AS invocations,
  COALESCE(SUM(user_message_tokens + system_prompt_tokens), 0) AS in_tokens,
  COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0) AS out_tokens,
  ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100, 4) AS usd,
  ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)::numeric, 0) AS avg_latency_ms
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE invoked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY pipeline, agent
ORDER BY usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

SELECT COALESCE(u.email, pi.user_id::text) AS user_email,
  COUNT(*) AS invocations,
  COALESCE(SUM(pi.user_message_tokens + pi.system_prompt_tokens), 0) AS in_tokens,
  COALESCE(SUM(pi.output_tokens), 0) AS out_tokens,
  ROUND(SUM(pi.total_cost_cents) / 100, 4) AS usd
FROM prompt_invocations pi
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = pi.user_id
WHERE pi.invoked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY user_email
ORDER BY usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Recorded spend by day + pipeline (30 d)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT invoked_at::date AS day, pipeline,
  COUNT(*) AS invocations,
  ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100, 4) AS usd
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE invoked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY day, pipeline
ORDER BY day DESC, usd DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Recorded daily spend by pipeline (USD, dashboard range)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(invoked_at, '1d'),
  pipeline AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(total_cost_cents) / 100, 4) AS usd
FROM prompt_invocations
WHERE $__timeFilter(invoked_at)
GROUP BY 1, pipeline
ORDER BY 1
